fields.name: Synth. Relation Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the synthetic relation.

fields.name: Rel. Native Entity Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the native entity.

fields.name: Rel. Virtual Entity Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the virtual entity.

fields.name: Syncd. Field 1 Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the column in the native Dataverse table that will be used to create the relation.

fields.name: Syncd. Field 1 External Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the native field used for the relation.

fields.name: Virtual Table Column 1 Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the virtual table used for the relation.

fields.name: Syncd. Field 2 External Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the native field used for the relation.

fields.name: Virtual Table Column 2 Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the virtual table used for the relation.

fields.name: Syncd. Field 3 External Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the native field used for the relation.

fields.name: Virtual Table Column 3 Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in the virtual table used for the relation.

fields.name: Virtual Table API Page Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the virtual table API page ID in Business Central.
